/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/CarRental.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarRental.dir/Functions/cpp/addcar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarRental.dir/Functions/cpp/editcar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarRental.dir/Functions/cpp/removecar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarRental.dir/Functions/cpp/addcustomer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarRental.dir/Functions/cpp/editcustomer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarRental.dir/Functions/cpp/removecustomer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarRental.dir/Functions/cpp/assigncar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarRental.dir/Functions/cpp/unassigncar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarRental.dir/Functions/cpp/search_carid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarRental.dir/Functions/cpp/Search_customerID.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarRental.dir/Functions/cpp/search_name.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarRental.dir/Functions/cpp/search_carBrand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarRental.dir/Functions/cpp/search_regNr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CarRental.dir/Functions/cpp/statistics.cpp.o -o CarRental  libsqlitecpp.a libsqlite3.a
